creator: open@di.mon.net.ua
text:
Trying to install FreeBSD i386 7.1 release but after making partitions installation stops with error kernel trap 12. I tried to load bsd with ACPI disabled - same error

Error photo:
http://di.mon.net.ua/pub/bsd-err.jpg

Before bsd I tried to setup Ubuntu - it stops with kernel panic too.

Then i tried Mandriva2007 and then Gentoo - and everything ok with both. Before that WinXP worked fine on this PC couple years.
